title: Counterexample
description: A structured counterexample from ESBMC verification failure

function.description: Name of the function where verification failed

inputs.description: Map of parameter names to counterexample values

vow_id.description: Numeric ID of the violated vow (matches vow_id in VowViolation)

offset.description: Byte offset of the vow clause

length.description: Byte length of the vow clause

source.description: Source location of the violated vow clause, or null

replay.description: Differential-test outcome (present only with --replay-cex): whether a debug-mode harness replaying the counterexample's concrete inputs fired the same VowViolation (vow_id + blame). Not part of the soundness proof.

replay_reason.description: Human-readable explanation for a diverged or skipped replay (present only with --replay-cex when replay is not confirmed)
